name: Gambas al ajillo

Meatballs: 400 g prawns (also called shrimps. not too small. They get cooked too much.)

instructions: - Peel the prawns completely. If they are big, cut them in 2 or 3 pieces.
- Throw them in the oil once it's mildly hot. Smaller pans are better so we have more depth for less oil, less waste. Heat on low from now on.
- Peel, crush and add the garlic
- When you see it's around 2 minutes from finishing, add parsley chopped in not too small bits.

serving: It's traditionally served hot in one of those red glazed terracotta dishes.
